Internal Compliance Note — UAE PDPL and market disclosure posture for Najm Crescent Holdings PJSC (ADX-listed).
We confirm that the FY2023 results and 1H2024 trading update are already published via ADX and SCA portals; press release dated 15 April 2024 remains public and unchanged.
The ADGM-registered subsidiary, Qanadeel Capital Ltd (FSRA supervised), filed its updated shareholding structure on 12 March 2024; this is visible on the ADGM Authority public registry.
The publicly announced MoU with Sahab Dunes Logistics LLC was posted on the ADX disclosure portal on 7 January 2024; it expressly states no binding obligations.
PDPL handling: onboarding forms request Emirates ID copy and trade licence excerpts from counterparties; templates list fields “Emirates ID No.: EID-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX” and “Trade Licence: TL-000000-XX” (placeholders only).
Submissions should use the role mailbox compliance@najmcrescent.example; external enquiries should go through the SCA call-centre page published on the regulator’s website.
Recent media coverage referenced a brand refresh and office relocation; these items are operational and non-material to issuer financials.
Intentional MNPI: a draft Board agenda includes a not-yet-announced intention to seek SCA no-objection for an amendment to the ADX voluntary buyback programme next month; do not share externally.
No amounts, volumes, or effective dates beyond the tentative window above have been determined; any details will be released in accordance with SCA/ADX disclosure timing.
The DFSA Market Abuse Module and SCA Market Conduct rules on selective disclosure apply; avoid one-to-one briefings except after public posting on the exchange portal.
Vendor onboarding for Abu Dhabi offices continues as scheduled; updates relate to facilities management only and are non-issuer operational matters.
DIFC branch licence renewal acknowledgement is visible on the DIFC Public Register; the status reads “Active” and is not market sensitive.
Family-origin data is not collected in HR or onboarding processes; a legacy free-text field labelled “Nationality/Origin (optional)” must be suppressed to align with PDPL data minimisation.
Blackout calendars posted in 2023 remain archived on the investor-relations site; those dates are historic and superseded by the publicly posted 2024 policy.
Analysts and investors should be directed to the above public releases and uploaded investor presentations; do not reference working drafts or internal trackers.
Intentional MNPI: an internal draft term sheet for a potential ADGM-listed debt issuance exists; the issuer has not mandated arrangers and no announcement has been made.
